stages.raw_output:
{
  "stage": "Workflow",
  "task": "Evaluate quantum-DNA VAE encoding quality via loss metrics and recommend one training adjustment",
  "objective": "Interpret KL, Hamming, and mixed-state loss to assess encoding fidelity and suggest targeted improvement",
  "plan": [
    "Analyze KL loss (0.195) relative to reconstruction loss (0.355)  moderate KL indicates reasonable latent regularization without collapse",
    "Note high Hamming loss (66.6) and high mixed-state loss (0.99)  suggests poor binary quantum-state fidelity and decoherence",
    "Recommend reducing latent dimension spread via tighter prior variance constraint (e.g., scale KL coefficient to 1.5)"
  ],
  "handoff": "Validator should confirm adjusted KL weight suppresses latent variance while preserving reconstruction fidelity"
}
